ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "maker" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "disp" REAL /* Displacement in cubic inches */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Gross horsepower */,
  "drat" REAL /* Rear axle ratio */,
  "wt" REAL /* Weight in 1000 lbs */,
  "qsec" REAL /* Quarter-mile time */,
  "vs" INTEGER /* V/S (V-engine or straight engine) */,
  "am" INTEGER /* Transmission type (automatic or manual) */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Number of forward gears */,
  "carb" INTEGER /* Number of carburetors */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive used in the vehicle */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the vehicle in gallons */,
  "towing_capacity" REAL /* Towing capacity of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_maker FOREIGN KEY ("maker") REFERENCES makers ("maker_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "makers" (
  "maker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle manufacturer */,
  "maker_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "established_year" TEXT /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "zero_to_sixty" REAL /* Time taken by the vehicle to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "fuel_efficiency_city" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle in the city in mpg */,
  "fuel_efficiency_highway" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle on the highway in mpg */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 to 0 mph */,
  "turning_radius" REAL /* Turning radius in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating out of 5 */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Customer comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered on the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES sales_people ("sales_person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_people" (
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the salesperson covers */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the salesperson */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the salesperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_service" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_service_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_service_mechanic_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanic_id") REFERENCES mechanics ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanics" (
  "mechanic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanic */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the mechanic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the mechanic */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the mechanic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the part is used in */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of the part */,
  "part_cost" REAL /* Cost of the part */,
  "part_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_parts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dealership */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_dealerships_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES dealership_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealership_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
